title: Oxidized Copper Gear
description: Oxidized Copper Armor and Tools, aka "Poor Man's Diamond"
body:
## Oxidized Copper Gear

Who wants boring fresh copper?
I prefer my copper very blue and old.

It looks a BIT similar to diamond so we can call it "Poor Man's Diamond"

![copper items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QDOBKN3t/images/4f2da4c48602395ea1cfede7e21235132d359616.png)
![comparison with and without the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QDOBKN3t/images/728eb05cc32c2bad3dd73bcf94e86b03d2b3ab64.png)
(sorry for bad lighting i dont have shaders on snapshots)

I'm not sure if mojang is going to make like official copper gear variants but I did it before them lol.
